When mspaint is getting the items for you, don't touch anything.

properties.disabledTooltip: Your executor doesn't support this feature.

elements.text: If you don't catch anything after a set number of minutes with Auto Fish enabled, this option will do the selected action.

If Auto Reel does not work with Tryhard Rod, enable Force Full Bar. Make sure to also have the correct enchant on the rod: <font color="rgb(225, 179, 229)">Unbreakable</font>, <font color="rgb(175, 155, 255)">Controlled</font> or <font color="rgb(255, 234, 0)">Herculean</font>.

warningBox.Title: WARNING
warningBox.Text: Using these exploits can cause data loss, please use them at your own risk.

warningBox.Title:
<font size="3"> 
</font><font size="16">Latest Changelog</font>
warningBox.Text:
<font size="5"> 
</font>[mspaint]
<font color="rgb(0,255,0)">Fixed two dialogs when error happens</font>
<font color="rgb(0,255,0)">Fixed infinite unloading on an language error</font>
<font color="rgb(0,255,0)">Made some changes on how dynamic values are placed into translations</font>
  ~ Our translators can now properly re-order dynamic values
  ~ If there are some issues with the translation, you can report it in language-feedback

[Doors]
<font color="rgb(0,255,0)">Fixed "Infinite items" making infinite items useless (not interactable)</font><font size="3"> 
</font>

elements.text: Good evening Player! Welcome back to mspaint!
Auto Send Trade Request is useful if you farm with multiple accounts, including your main account, on the same server. You can set up an autoclicker on the main account to accept the offers.
